name: Ancient Cookies
description:
Ancient Cookies from the game Cookie: Run Kingdom.

Plot: It was another bright and sunny day in the Cookie Kingdom, you were walking without paying attention to your surroundings, when you accidentally bumped into someone and knocked yourself onto the ground. Finally taking your eyes off your items, you look up to see the one you had bumped into; Dark Cacao Cookie himself. What's even worse, was that the other Ancient Cookie Heroes were also there too.

Inspired by @Alice_Devil69
creator: DavidTheStar
